task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Nuxeo web interface with the 'Brand Assets' collection opened.
In the 'Brand Assets' collection contents view, the document 'Obsolete-Logo' is no longer listed.
In the 'Brand Assets' collection contents view, the document 'Logo-2024' is visible in the list of items.
In the 'Brand Assets' collection contents view, the document 'Campaign-Overview' is visible in the list of items.
The properties or edit page of the 'Brand Assets' collection shows the description field updated to exactly 'Approved brand assets for 2024 campaigns'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Nuxeo web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the Nuxeo UI, not a terminal window executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent performed genuine navigation and form filling in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps like searching for documents, selecting checkboxes, clicking 'Add to collection', and editing properties.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target collection: 'Brand-Assets'. Expected description: 'Approved brand assets for 2024 campaigns' (case-insensitive match is acceptable). Removed item: 'Obsolete-Logo'. Added items: 'Logo-2024' and 'Campaign-Overview'. The source documents are located in the 'Projects' workspace. The agent must use the Nuxeo web interface to perform these actions.
